creator: taoka@infonets.hiroshima-u.ac.jp
text:
This PR has a patch to upgrade.
For the patch attached, please you run:

patch -pE < this_patch

Then, you have to delete the following files:

----------------------------------------------------------------------
./japanese/kinput2-canna+wnn/files/md5
./japanese/kinput2-canna+wnn/patches/patch-aa
./japanese/kinput2-canna+wnn/patches/patch-ab

./japanese/kinput2-canna+wnn/patches/patch-ad
./japanese/kinput2-canna+wnn/pkg/COMMENT
./japanese/kinput2-canna+wnn/pkg/DESCR
./japanese/kinput2-canna+wnn/pkg/PLIST
./japanese/kinput2-canna+wnn/Makefile
./japanese/kinput2-canna+sj3/files/md5

./japanese/kinput2-canna/files/md5
./japanese/kinput2-canna/patches/patch-aa
./japanese/kinput2-sj3/files/md5
./japanese/kinput2-sj3/patches/patch-aa
./japanese/kinput2-sj3+wnn/files/md5
./japanese/kinput2-sj3+wnn/patches/patch-aa
./japanese/kinput2-sj3+wnn/patches/patch-ab
./japanese/kinput2-sj3+wnn/patches/patch-ac
./japanese/kinput2-sj3+wnn/pkg/COMMENT

./japanese/kinput2-wnn/patches/patch-ab
./japanese/kinput2-wnn/pkg/COMMENT
./japanese/kinput2-wnn/pkg/DESCR
./japanese/kinput2-wnn/pkg/PLIST
./japanese/kinput2-wnn/Makefile
----------------------------------------------------------------------

and delete directorieses:

----------------------------------------------------------------------
./japanese/kinput2-canna/files
./japanese/kinput2-canna/patches
./japanese/kinput2-canna+sj3/files
./japanese/kinput2-canna+sj3/patches

----------------------------------------------------------------------

Fix: 

.--ex8JjJL6cKid3Tosca8dn1vh8JKE1I87Vb3BpLhIiBtv9H7S
